name: WellCare of Kentucky
description: WellCare of Kentucky is a Centene Corporation Medicaid managed care plan serving Kentucky Medicaid members statewide. WellCare covers the full continuum of substance use disorder treatment — from medical detox through outpatient MAT — with a focus on integrated behavioral health for members with co-occurring mental health conditions.
coverageHighlights: Medical withdrawal management (ASAM 3.7 and 4) with authorization
Residential SUD treatment (ASAM 3.1, 3.3, 3.5) based on ASAM medical-necessity criteria
PHP (ASAM 2.5) and IOP (ASAM 2.1) as step-down or step-up levels
Outpatient SUD counseling — individual, group, and family
Medication-Assisted Treatment — Suboxone, methadone, Vivitrol, oral naltrexone
Dual-diagnosis and integrated behavioral health services
Peer support and recovery coaching as a covered Medicaid benefit
Non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) for treatment visits
priorAuthNotes: WellCare of Kentucky typically applies ASAM criteria for medical-necessity determinations. Residential SUD admissions generally require prior authorization; outpatient services, PHP, and IOP may be handled through notification and concurrent review.
memberBenefitsNote: WellCare members have access to a 24/7 nurse advice line, care management for complex SUD and dual-diagnosis needs, and Centene's integrated behavioral health network.
